name: pluxx
description: Import, migrate, validate, refine, build, and maintain Pluxx plugins inside Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Turn MCPs and existing plugins into maintained multi-host projects
interface.longDescription: Use Pluxx inside Codex to import MCPs, migrate existing plugins, validate scaffolds, refine taxonomy and instructions, build target outputs, and keep generated projects synced over time.
defaultPrompt: Use Pluxx to import or migrate this plugin into a maintained project and validate the result.
Use Pluxx to refine this scaffold safely, then rerun validation.
Use Pluxx to build this scaffold for the core four and install the target I want to test.
